evals.prompt: I want backlinks and free traffic for my AI meeting-notes app (live, freemium, $12/mo pro tier). Where should I submit it? Give me everything I need to actually do the submissions.
evals.expected_output: A submission asset kit (name, tagline, short/medium/long descriptions, logo/screenshot specs, tags, pricing tag), a customized tier-ranked directory list drawing on the bundled directory database including AI-specific directories, a 30-day submission calendar, and per-directory description variants.
assertions: All core submission assets are drafted (tagline under 60 chars, multiple description lengths, tags)
The directory list is tiered/prioritized and includes AI-specific directories given the product category
A day-by-day or week-by-week submission schedule is included spreading submissions out
Description variants are adapted for at least 2 different directory audiences
Post-submission tracking (e.g. Search Console) is mentioned

evals.prompt: is it worth submitting my b2b invoicing saas to those AI tool directories? and which directories actually matter for b2b?
evals.expected_output: A direct answer: skip AI-tool directories for a non-AI B2B product (mismatched audience, low-value backlink), with the B2B-relevant set instead (G2, Capterra, GetApp, SaaSHub, AlternativeTo) and what to prepare for each.
assertions: The output advises against AI directories for a non-AI product rather than recommending everything
At least 4 B2B-relevant directories are named
The reasoning covers audience match, not just backlink counting
Concrete submission requirements or assets are listed for the recommended directories
